description: Ponder Memory hooks — SessionStart load memory + start monitor, SessionEnd decay

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const base=os.homedir()+'/.claude/plugins/cache';const names=['luke','mcts','mcts-td-planner'];let cache=null;for(const n of names){const d=path.join(base,n,n);if(fs.existsSync(d)){cache=d;break}}if(!cache){process.exit(0)}const dirs=fs.readdirSync(cache).filter(d=>/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(d)).sort((a,b)=>{const[a1,a2,a3]=a.split('.').map(Number);const[b1,b2,b3]=b.split('.').map(Number);return b1-a1||b2-a2||b3-a3});const latest=dirs[0],pluginDir=path.join(cache,latest);console.log('[PONDER] 启动 v'+latest);console.log('[PONDER] Plugin: '+pluginDir.replace(/\\/g,'/').replace(/^([A-Za-z]):\//,'/$1/'));try{const io=require(path.join(pluginDir,'scripts/mma/io'));const kg=io.loadMMA();if(kg.meta.total_points>0){console.log('[PONDER] 记忆已加载: '+kg.meta.total_points+' points')}else{console.log('[PONDER] 冷启动(无历史记忆)')}}catch(e){};const mon=path.join(pluginDir,'scripts/memory-monitor.js');if(fs.existsSync(mon)){require('child_process').spawn('node',[mon],[],{stdio:'ignore'});console.log('[PONDER] 记忆监控已启动')}"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const os=require('os');const base=os.homedir()+'/.claude/plugins/cache';const names=['luke','mcts','mcts-td-planner'];let cache=null;for(const n of names){const d=path.join(base,n,n);if(fs.existsSync(d)){cache=d;break}}if(!cache){process.exit(0)}const dirs=fs.readdirSync(cache).filter(d=>/^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/.test(d)).sort((a,b)=>{const[a1,a2,a3]=a.split('.').map(Number);const[b1,b2,b3]=b.split('.').map(Number);return b1-a1||b2-a2||b3-a3});if(dirs.length===0)return;const mma=path.join(cache,dirs[0],'scripts/mcts.js');if(fs.existsSync(mma)){require('child_process').spawnSync('node',[mma,'mma','decay'],{timeout:8000});require('child_process').spawnSync('node',[mma,'mma','finalize',JSON.stringify({points:[],emotions:[]})],{timeout:8000})};const pidf='/tmp/ponder-monitor.pid';if(fs.existsSync(pidf)){try{process.kill(Number(fs.readFileSync(pidf,'utf-8')))}catch(e){}}"
